compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect promptfoo-based skills eval framework
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and any other existing docs to document the eval framework: orchestrator usage, per-skill eval convention, CI workflow, P0 visibility mechanism, and grader model configuration.

**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate awareness of the eval framework to author evals, troubleshoot CI failures, and understand the P0 ticket mechanism.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (architecture section, quick reference, config keys), existing doc updates where test gate or CI behavior is referenced
- OUT: New documentation files

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
